The team is preparing a US pipeline-creation campaign. It will promote Route orchestration software in Enterprise logistics across United States and Canada. The product is Route orchestration software. The market is Enterprise logistics. Locale is US. Geographies include United States and Canada.

The focus is retail and third-party logistics organizations with 1000+ employees; industries include Retail and Third-party logistics; company size is 1000+. The people we need are VP Logistics and Director of Transportation in Operations or Supply Chain, at VP or Director level. Titles include VP Logistics and Director of Transportation. Functions include Operations and Supply Chain. Seniorities are Director and VP.

They are researching route optimization and last mile logistics because manual dispatch exceptions and high cost-to-serve worsen under SLA pressure and mixed fleet complexity. Keywords include route optimization and last mile logistics. Pains include manual dispatch exceptions and high cost-to-serve. Triggers include SLA pressure and mixed fleet complexity. Campaign goal is Pipeline creation. Preferred channels include linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
